evals.prompt: Review .github/copilot-instructions.md after several new skills were added and tell me what should change.
evals.expected_output: A review that updates the skill list, routing hints, and any workflow commands that changed, while keeping feature-level detail in skills.
assertions: The response checks skill listings or routing hints
The response checks workflow or command drift
The response avoids moving feature-level detail into the top-level file by default
